Death resist sometimes works more efficiently than blocking though. Especially for big single hit attacks, if you’ve got a % heal upcoming, sometimes it makes more sense to eat the hit then recover back.
Freeing up the current turn for more efficient usage

Because fundamentally, death resisting 10 damage is the same as dr-ing 1000 damage. So instead of spending 3-4 mana just to barely survive, you use the turn setting up for next, or just getting in your own damage.
Or another way I see it is: if you end the stage with >100% death resist, you wasted a resource, and could likely have cleared at least 1 turn sooner
